case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JONITKA HEARNE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
